docket_entries.description: EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,000.00 FILED BY MENDOZA, MANUEL AS TO DEFENDANT YAP (INDIVIDUALLY), PENG DBA  P & K AUTOMOTIVE INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-09-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED (SERVICE FEE $30.00) SERVED FEB-25-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT YAP (INDIVIDUALLY), PENG DBA  P & K AUTOMOTIVE INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-09-2008 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-09-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-09-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. DEFENDANT'S SON KOK YAP, INTERPRETS ENGLISH/CHINESE - CHINESE/ENGLISH ON HIS BEHALF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MENDOZA, MANUEL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT YAP (INDIVIDUALLY), PENG DBA  P & K AUTOMOTIVE INC. THE EVIDENCE DID NOT ESTABLISH THAT DEFENDANT CAUSED THE HEAD GASKET PROBLEM IN PLAINTIFF'S CAR, OR THAT PREVIOUS CHARGES WERE UNAUTHORIZED OR UNREASONABLE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
